1: Then Jonah prayed unto the LORD LORD his God out of the fish's belly,
2: And And thou heardest my voice.
3: All thy billows and thy waves passed over me.
4: Yet I will look again toward thy holy temple.
5: The weeds were wrapped about my head.
6: Yet hast thou brought up my life from corruption, O LORD LORD my God.
7: And my prayer came in unto thee, into thine holy temple.
9: Salvation is is of the LORD LORD .
10: And the LORD LORD spake unto the fish, and it vomited out Jonah upon the dry land land .
